hypothesis: FM-33 (N=1000 enforcement-dilution waypoint) can be moved from UNMITIGATED to MINIMAL by replacing advisory DUE with structural auto-apply in maintenance_health.py. L-601 predicts advisory protocols decay at high concurrency; auto-apply (detect->write->NOTICE) is the structural floor.
method: Refactored check_scale_waypoints() into table-driven _auto_apply_enforcement_cadence() with: (1) auto-write cadence change to periodics.json, (2) URGENT on read/write failure instead of DUE fallback, (3) URGENT on missing periodic item, (4) table-driven _N1000_CADENCE_TARGETS for extensibility. Tested 4 edge cases: cadence already at target, cadence needs reduction, missing periodic, and unreadable file.
expect: FM-33 UNMITIGATED->MINIMAL: wire automatic cadence-adjustment into maintenance_health.py N=1000 waypoint. Auto-apply fires when cadence > target; failure of the fix itself is visible (URGENT not DUE).

results.test_cadence_needs_reduction: cadence=5: auto-applies to 3, emits NOTICE (correct, structural fix)
results.test_missing_periodic: enforcement-audit absent: emits URGENT (correct, visible failure)
results.test_import: maintenance_health imports without error, contract_check SATISFIED

actual: FM-33 UNMITIGATED->MINIMAL. check_scale_waypoints() delegates to _auto_apply_enforcement_cadence() which auto-writes cadence changes. Three improvements over initial S453 implementation: (1) failure-of-the-fix is URGENT not DUE (recursive L-601 protection), (2) missing-periodic detection with explicit URGENT, (3) table-driven _N1000_CADENCE_TARGETS for future waypoint additions. Pattern: detect->auto-fix->NOTICE (not detect->DUE->hope).
diff: Expected auto-apply mechanism. Got auto-apply mechanism with error-visibility hardening. The DUE fallback in the original except clause was itself an FM-33 instance (advisory fallback for a structural fix). Replaced with URGENT to make the failure of the fix visible.

defense_layers: URGENT on auto-apply failure (S453, error-visibility — prevents recursive L-601 decay)
URGENT on missing periodic (S453, gap detection)
data.reason_latent: cadence already manually reduced in S448 — auto-apply condition (cadence > 3) is false
data.extensibility: _N1000_CADENCE_TARGETS table allows adding future periodic cadence adjustments without code changes

conclusion: FM-33 UNMITIGATED->MINIMAL. L-601 instance resolved: advisory->structural with error-visibility hardening. The fix itself cannot silently decay to advisory — its own failures are URGENT-visible. Prospective: next N-waypoint (N=1500 per L-1066 falsification criterion) should add entries to _N1000_CADENCE_TARGETS table.
